description_long: This is a rectangular wooden fence section composed of a grid of vertical and horizontal slats, forming a lattice-like structure. The wood appears weathered with a medium brown coloration, and the surface texture is visibly rough, suggesting outdoor use. The fence consists of two horizontal rails supporting a series of evenly spaced vertical posts, all of which are squared and lack any decorative caps or embellishments. The top edge of the fence is flat, with all posts terminating at the same height. There are no visible hinges, gates, or movable parts, indicating this is a fixed segment rather than a functional gate. The open grid design allows visibility and airflow while serving as a barrier.
description: A rectangular, grid-patterned wooden fence section with a flat top and rough, weathered brown surface. It features two horizontal rails and evenly spaced vertical posts, forming a simple, open lattice.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full grid of vertical and horizontal wooden slats, with all posts and rails clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the fence, with the slats aligned and little depth visible.
description_view_2: Rear view, visually identical to the front, displaying the same grid of wooden slats and rails.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the narrow thickness of the fence structure.
